prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ff2825db`.
codex_response:
The rule is: keep the `1122334455` header unchanged, then in the lower panel ignore `0` and the original frame color, pick the most frequent remaining color, and redraw the panel as that color’s full outer border plus the outline of that color’s input bounding box. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for `ff2825db`.

Implemented the task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ff2825db/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ff2825db/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ff2825db/generator.py). No new primitive was needed. The generator stays in-family by fixing the 10x10 header/border layout, sampling a latent dominant-color bounding box, placing sparse-to-moderate dominant fragments inside it, and adding weaker distractor fragments in the interior.

Validation passed: official verifier check was `5/5`, the shared builder produced 1000 verified examples, and the preview sheet looked visually consistent. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff2825db/task.json), [examples/](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff2825db/examples), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff2825db/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff2825db/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff2825db/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ff2825db/previews/preview_03.png).
